div.h2: JUMP_IF_FALSE must pop condition in BOTH branches

g.text: If Truthy | STAYS on stack | REMOVED from stack
If Falsy | Removed in block | Already removed

text.tspan: // BUG: cond remains on stack if Truthy!
// BUG: cond remains on stack if Truthy!
// Condition is cleared in both branches
// Condition is cleared in both branches

div.p: The condition must be popped before the branch decision. The stack transition is part of the instruction's base contract, not its conditional side-effects.
